column2: Selected reviewed workbook rows with ignore_status=USE and validated GitHub repository access using Get_Reviewed_Repositories.py v1.0.0
Repositories were read from the reviewed workbook, filtered by ignore_status=USE, and checked through the GitHub repository API.
Two-stage process: stage 1 manual review in Summary_Reviewed_List.xlsx; stage 2 automated access validation for the selected repositories.
